order_number.orig_str: शासन परिपत्रक क्रमांकः संकीर्ण-२०२६/प्र.क्र.१७/कोषा प्रशा-४, दिनांक : १८ मार्च, २०२६

para_trans: Funding of Centrally Sponsored Schemes in the year 2025-26
In line with just-in-time delivery through the SNA SPARSH model
Government Circular No. Narrow - 2026 / Q. No.17 / Treasuries - 4
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk
Reference - Office Memorandum of the Government of India, Ministry of Finance, Department of Expenditure (PFMS Division)
Government of India, Ministry of Finance, Department of Expenditure (Department of Public Financial Management)
The office memorandum in question is being co-published with this.
2. In accordance with the present office memorandum, all the Ministries / Administrative Departments in order to avoid any last minute rush while processing the payment files under SNA SPARSH.
They shall take necessary action in accordance with the official memorandum under the reference of the Government of India.
This Government Circular is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
